raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered XXXX lamps from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and a runner rug The lamps arrived damaged and incorrect, so I set up a return with XXXX. 
Both lamps were shipped in one box and returned in one box but I was not refunded for some reason even though XXXX confirmed the reutrn and refund. 
I disputed with Citi and sent them everything I had including the full tracking number with weight as the order shipped and was returned. 
They closed the dispute and refused to listen to anything I had to say. 

I am not sure why they say they refunded me for one lamp and one runner but didn't when they should have actually refunded me for everything. 

Now that I am realizing that Citi uses AI to process disputes, I want to report this in hopes someone would help. This is a lot of money to be out of and I deserve a credit. I have since learned that XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX their owner, are not well respected for refunding people, but CITI should have had my back on this. 
I gave them meticulous support that the whole order was returned and should have been refunded. 


XX/XX/year> {$580.00} XXXX ceramic lamps purchased XXXX broken incorrect lamps returned there was also a runner i have also reached out to XXXX many times. 

i can not believe that this was overlooked. I have a XXXX XXXX and try to do the best I can to stay ontop of all of this but this was obviously missed by Citi.
